---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement for batch screening, detectors, MCP, or docs
title: "[feat] "
labels: ["enhancement"]
---

## Problem

What gap or friction does this address?

## Proposal

Describe the desired behaviour (CLI flag, detector, MCP tool, docs, etc.).

## Alternatives considered

Anything you already tried or ruled out.

## Scope notes

ManuSift product surface is **batch CLI + MCP** (no conversational chat agent).
Offline screening with `--no-llm` must remain usable without API keys.
